name: Crispy Corn Dogs
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil or shortening for frying.
2. In a medium bowl, mix flour, cornmeal, baking powder, and salt.
3. With a pastry blender or fork, cut in 2 tablespoons of shortening until the mixture resembles fine crumbs.
4. In a small bowl, combine egg and milk. Add to the dry mixture; mix well.
5. Pat frankfurters dry with paper towels.
6. Dip franks into batter using tongs, being careful to coat all sides. Let excess batter drip off.
7. Drop 1 or 2 at a time into hot oil. Fry until golden, about 1 minute on each side.
8. Insert wooden skewer in the end of each.
9. Serve hot, with mustard if desired.
